shops.notes: Founded 1986. AS9100D certified. Zero-tolerance rejection policy. Serves automotive, aerospace, commercial, medical, computer/electronics, oil and gas industries. Produces parts to +/-.0001 tolerances. Dock-to-Stock quality.

Over 20 years machining experience. AS9100, ISO9000, ITAR Certified. Serves defense, aerospace, automotive, aviation, medical, electronic, high technology industries. Complex, tight tolerance parts to LTA production.

AS9100D Certified. Serves aerospace, defense, medical, pharmaceutical (softgel tooling), racing, oil & gas industries. Located in Pacoima, serves Los Angeles and Orange County. 4 and 5-Axis machining capabilities.

Founded 1971. 53+ years experience. AS9100/ISO9001 certified. Serves aerospace, defense, medical, semiconductor, underwater, commercial industries. Machines aluminum, stainless, titanium, copper, super alloys, plastics. Parts from fractions of an inch to 12-inch diameters.

Founded 1978. 40+ years in business. ISO9001:2015 and AS9100D certified. 28,000 sq ft facility. Specializes in high-temp alloys and exotic plastics. Serves aerospace, medical, semiconductor industries. Located in Poway, serves San Diego area.
29 years in business. Single piece to large production runs. On-time, on-budget delivery guarantee.
Serving San Diego machining industry since 1984 (40 years). Fast turnarounds, high quality precision parts.
Over 20 years experience. Serves aerospace, marine, medical, commercial sectors. Advanced waterjet cutting technology. Works with aluminum, stainless steel, titanium.

18,000 sq ft facility, 18 CNC machines, 5-axis capabilities, Mill Turn, Multi Pallet high production. ISO9000 quality compliance. Sacramento's premiere rapid prototyping and production CNC machining facility.

Founded 2020. Tight-tolerance parts on time and on budget. ±.0001" tolerances, fast turnarounds. Handles single prototypes to full production runs. Aluminum aerospace components, large-scale steel parts.
520 Harbor Boulevard, West Sacramento. Large capacity lathe (7'x35'), surface grinding with 84" Dia magnetic table, dual overhead cranes to 15 tons. Mobile fabrication and repair services.

20+ years in business. Specializes in medical components machining, dental implants, precision medical products. Also serves aerospace, defense, automotive, computer, sporting goods. 11 Citizen Swiss screw machines. Family-owned, third generation machining family.

30+ years precision CNC machining experience. 24/7 lights-out automation. Tolerances to +/- 0.0002". Certified AS9100D & ISO 9001:2015, ITAR Registered, DOD Contractor, HUBZone Certified. Serves defense, medical device, space, automotive, industrial, aerospace. A-rated by ISNetworld.
Established 2011. 3,000 sq ft climate-controlled facility in South California. 24/7 operation capability. Serves government agencies, DOD, aerospace, racing, oil & gas, medical equipment.

40+ years in business. 10+ degreed engineers on staff. AS9100, ISO9100, NADCAP, ITAR certified. Average lead time 3.2 weeks. Order range $750 - $7M. Serves aerospace, defense, medical, robotics, scientific research, transportation industries.
Orange County's preferred one-stop shop for fabrication, machining, and welding. Serves Anaheim, Santa Ana, Huntington Beach, Newport Beach, Garden Grove, Costa Mesa.

Nearly 50 years in business. ISO 9001:2015 Certified. 30 CNC Machining Centers, 7 Horizontal Centers with 100+ pallets, 12 Haas Vertical Mills, 2 Screw Machines, 8 Turning Centers. 24/7 machining facility. Lower cost than overseas, fast turnaround.
Founded 1967. 57+ years serving Central Valley including Fresno, Madera, Merced. Contract manufacturing and precision fabrication. Full service manufacturing from design to finishing.

1411 North Whitney Avenue, Fresno. Over 40 years metal fabrication and machining experience. CNC equipment with 4th axis capabilities. Expert craftsmen and problem solvers. Single custom parts to full production runs.
Over 20 years delivering precision machining. Serves Sacramento area with advanced CNC machining services.
AS9100 certified, ITAR registered. Nationwide shipping. Provides CNC milling, turning, Wire EDM, Sinker EDM, and turnkey assembly services.
110,000 square foot facility in San Diego area. Offers California-based CNC machining services, powder coating, welding and more.
